# PT. Dania Multi Prima (DMP) - Software House & IT Consultant

PT. Dania Multi Prima (DMP) is a leading Software House and IT Consultant based in Medan, Deli Serdang, Sumatera Utara, Indonesia. 

## Services:
- Custom Application Development (Android, iOS, Web)
- E-Government & Smart City Solutions (SPBE)
- Hospital Management Systems (SIMRS Satu Sehat)
- Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
- IT Infrastructure & Networking

## Contact:
- Phone: +62-813-8050-510
- Email: daniamultiprima@gmail.com
- Address: Jln. Medan-Binjai, Diski, Km. 14.5, Sunggal, Deli Serdang, Sumatera Utara, 20351, Indonesia.
